<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>LOS 400 ERRORES — Una película que fracasa</title>
  <meta name="description" content="Una película que fracasa. Estoy viva. Mírame. Escúchame. Siénteme." />
  <meta property="og:title" content="LOS 400 ERRORES" />
  <meta property="og:description" content="Una película que fracasa. Estoy viva." />
  <meta property="og:type" content="website" />

  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Share+Tech+Mono&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />

  <style>
    :root {
      --negro: #0A0008;
      --amarillo: #FFEC00;
      --magenta: #FF006E;
      --cyan: #08C8FF;
      --naranja: #FF4500;
      --violeta: #9B00D4;
      --blanco: #F5F0E8;
      --rojo-error: #E8001C;
    }

    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

    body {
      background: var(--negro);
      color: var(--blanco);
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      overflow-x: hidden;
      cursor: crosshair;
      padding-bottom: 2rem;
    }

    /* ─── GLITCH CANVAS ─── */
    #glitch-canvas {
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 0;
      opacity: 0.04;
    }

    body::before {
      content: '';
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='1'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
      opacity: 0.035;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 0;
    }

    section {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 6rem) clamp(1.5rem, 6vw, 5rem);
    }

    /* ─── HERO ─── */
    #hero {
      min-height: 100svh;
      align-items: flex-start;
      padding-top: clamp(4rem, 12vw, 8rem);
      padding-bottom: 3rem;
    }

    .hero-eyebrow {
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      font-size: clamp(0.6rem, 1.2vw, 0.78rem);
      letter-spacing: 0.3em;
      color: var(--magenta);
      text-transform: uppercase;
      margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
      opacity: 0;
      animation: fadeSlide 0.6s 0.3s forwards;
    }

    .hero-title {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-weight: 400;
      font-size: clamp(5.5rem, 22vw, 19rem);
      line-height: 0.88;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--blanco);
      letter-spacing: 0.01em;
      opacity: 0;
      animation: fadeSlide 0.8s 0.5s forwards;
    }

    .hero-title span.block { display: block; }

    .hero-sub {
      margin-top: 3rem;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 0.5rem;
      opacity: 0;
      animation: fadeSlide 0.8s 1s forwards;
    }

    .hero-sub-line {
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      font-size: clamp(0.7rem, 1.4vw, 0.95rem);
      letter-spacing: 0.15em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    .hero-sub-line.c-magenta { color: var(--magenta); }
    .hero-sub-line.c-cyan    { color: var(--cyan); }
    .hero-sub-line.c-naranja { color: var(--naranja); }
    .hero-sub-line.c-violeta { color: var(--violeta); }

    .scroll-hint {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 2.5rem;
      left: clamp(1.5rem, 6vw, 5rem);
      font-size: 0.62rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.35em;
      color: var(--blanco);
      opacity: 0.2;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      animation: pulse 3s infinite;
    }

    /* ─── HABLA LA PELÍCULA ─── */
    #habla {
      min-height: auto;
      padding-top: 5rem;
      padding-bottom: 5rem;
    }

    .speak-block { max-width: 860px; }

    .speak-line {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 5.5vw, 4.5rem);
      line-height: 1.08;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateX(-24px);
      transition: opacity 0.5s, transform 0.5s;
      margin-bottom: 0.05em;
    }

    .speak-line.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
    .speak-line.white   { color: var(--blanco); }
    .speak-line.yellow  { color: var(--amarillo); }
    .speak-line.mag     { color: var(--magenta); }
    .speak-line.cy      { color: var(--cyan); }
    .speak-line.or      { color: var(--naranja); }
    .speak-line.vi      { color: var(--violeta); }

    /* ─── TRAILER ─── */
    #trailer {
      background: #000;
      min-height: auto;
      padding-top: 4rem;
      padding-bottom: 4rem;
      align-items: flex-start;
    }

    .trailer-label {
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 0.68rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.35em;
      color: var(--magenta);
      text-transform: uppercase;
      margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    }

    .video-wrap {
      width: 100%;
      max-width: 900px;
      aspect-ratio: 16/9;
      background: #0a0a0a;
      border: 1px solid #1a1a1a;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .video-wrap iframe { width: 100%; height: 100%; border: none; }

    .video-placeholder {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 1rem;
    }

    .video-placeholder-title {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 4vw, 3rem);
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--amarillo);
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    }

    .video-placeholder-sub {
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.3em;
      color: var(--blanco);
      opacity: 0.25;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    /* ─── PLATAFORMAS ─── */
    #plataformas {
      min-height: auto;
      padding-top: 5rem;
      padding-bottom: 5rem;
      border-top: 3px solid var(--amarillo);
    }

    .plataformas-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: baseline;
      gap: 2rem;
      margin-bottom: 3rem;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .plataformas-title {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 6vw, 5rem);
      color: var(--blanco);
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
    }

    .plataformas-precio {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 3.5rem);
      color: var(--amarillo);
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
    }

    .plataformas-sub {
      font-size: 0.62rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.3em;
      color: var(--blanco);
      opacity: 0.3;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
    }

    .plataformas-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr));
      gap: 2px;
      max-width: 1000px;
    }

    .plataforma-btn {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 1.4rem 1.5rem;
      border: 1px solid #222;
      text-decoration: none;
      background: transparent;
      transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s;
      cursor: pointer;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .plataforma-btn::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0;
      width: 3px;
      background: var(--color-acento, var(--amarillo));
      transform: scaleY(0);
      transform-origin: bottom;
      transition: transform 0.2s;
    }

    .plataforma-btn:hover {
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
      border-color: var(--color-acento, var(--amarillo));
    }

    .plataforma-btn:hover::before { transform: scaleY(1); }

    .plat-nombre {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 1.3rem;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
      color: var(--blanco);
      margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    }

    .plat-tipo {
      font-size: 0.58rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.25em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      opacity: 0.35;
      color: var(--blanco);
    }

    .plat-arrow {
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      color: var(--color-acento, var(--amarillo));
      margin-top: 1rem;
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity 0.15s, transform 0.15s;
      transform: translateX(-4px);
    }

    .plataforma-btn:hover .plat-arrow {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateX(0);
    }

    /* ─── INTENTA TICKER ─── */
    #intenta {
      background: var(--amarillo);
      min-height: auto;
      padding-top: 4rem;
      padding-bottom: 4rem;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .intenta-scroll {
      display: flex;
      gap: 4rem;
      white-space: nowrap;
      animation: scrollText 18s linear infinite;
      width: max-content;
    }

    .intenta-word {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(3rem, 10vw, 8rem);
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--negro);
      letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    }

    .intenta-word.err {
      color: var(--magenta);
      -webkit-text-stroke: 2px var(--negro);
    }

    /* ─── SINOPSIS ─── */
    #sinopsis {
      min-height: auto;
      padding-top: 6rem;
      padding-bottom: 6rem;
      border-top: 1px solid #1f1f1f;
    }

    .sinopsis-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr;
      gap: 4rem;
      max-width: 1000px;
      align-items: start;
    }

    .sinopsis-label {
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 0.62rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.35em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--cyan);
      padding-top: 0.3rem;
      line-height: 2;
    }

    .sinopsis-text p {
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      font-size: clamp(0.78rem, 1.3vw, 0.95rem);
      line-height: 2;
      color: var(--blanco);
      opacity: 0.7;
      margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    }

    .sinopsis-text p strong {
      color: var(--amarillo);
      font-weight: normal;
    }

    /* ─── DATOS ─── */
    #datos {
      min-height: auto;
      padding-top: 5rem;
      padding-bottom: 5rem;
      border-top: 1px solid #1a1a1a;
    }

    .datos-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr));
      gap: 2px;
      max-width: 900px;
    }

    .dato-item {
      padding: 2rem 1.5rem;
      border: 1px solid #1f1f1f;
      transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s;
    }

    .dato-item:hover {
      border-color: var(--amarillo);
      background: rgba(255,236,0,0.03);
    }

    .dato-num {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 5vw, 4rem);
      line-height: 1;
      margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    }

    .dato-label {
      font-size: 0.6rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.3em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      opacity: 0.35;
    }

    /* ─── CTA FINAL ─── */
    #cta {
      min-height: 80svh;
      justify-content: center;
      align-items: flex-start;
      border-top: 1px solid #1a1a1a;
    }

    .cta-pre {
      font-size: 0.62rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.35em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--cyan);
      margin-bottom: 2rem;
    }

    .cta-phrase {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 8vw, 7rem);
      line-height: 1;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--blanco);
      max-width: 800px;
      margin-bottom: 1rem;
    }

    .cta-phrase em {
      font-style: normal;
      color: var(--magenta);
    }

    .cta-elige {
      font-size: 0.62rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.3em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--blanco);
      opacity: 0.3;
      margin-bottom: 3rem;
    }

    /* ─── FOOTER ─── */
    footer {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
      padding: 2rem clamp(1.5rem, 6vw, 5rem);
      border-top: 1px solid #161616;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 1rem;
    }

    .footer-logo {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 1rem;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      color: var(--blanco);
      opacity: 0.3;
    }

    .footer-links {
      display: flex;
      gap: 2rem;
      list-style: none;
    }

    .footer-links a {
      font-size: 0.58rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.3em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--blanco);
      text-decoration: none;
      opacity: 0.25;
      transition: opacity 0.2s, color 0.2s;
    }

    .footer-links a:hover { opacity: 1; color: var(--cyan); }

    /* ─── GLITCH ─── */
    .glitch { position: relative; display: inline; }

    .glitch::before,
    .glitch::after {
      content: attr(data-text);
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      clip-path: polygon(0 0, 100% 0, 100% 33%, 0 33%);
    }

    .glitch::before {
      color: var(--cyan);
      transform: translateX(-3px);
      animation: glitchTop 5s infinite step-end;
    }

    .glitch::after {
      color: var(--magenta);
      clip-path: polygon(0 66%, 100% 66%, 100% 100%, 0 100%);
      transform: translateX(3px);
      animation: glitchBot 5s 2s infinite step-end;
    }

    /* ─── ERROR TICKER ─── */
    .error-ticker {
      position: fixed;
      bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
      z-index: 100;
      background: var(--rojo-error);
      padding: 0.28rem 0;
      overflow: hidden;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .error-ticker-inner {
      display: flex;
      gap: 3rem;
      white-space: nowrap;
      animation: scrollText 12s linear infinite;
      width: max-content;
    }

    .error-ticker span {
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 0.58rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.2em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--blanco);
    }

    .scanline {
      position: fixed;
      left: 0; width: 100%; height: 2px;
      background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(8,200,255,0.07), transparent);
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 50;
      animation: scanline 9s linear infinite;
    }

    /* ─── KEYFRAMES ─── */
    @keyframes fadeSlide {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(14px); }
      to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }

    @keyframes scrollText {
      from { transform: translateX(0); }
      to   { transform: translateX(-50%); }
    }

    @keyframes pulse {
      0%,100% { opacity: 0.2; }
      50%     { opacity: 0.45; }
    }

    @keyframes glitchTop {
      0%,91%,100% { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 0; }
      92% { transform: translateX(-4px); opacity: 1; }
      94% { transform: translateX(3px);  opacity: 1; }
      96% { transform: translateX(-2px); opacity: 1; }
    }

    @keyframes glitchBot {
      0%,89%,100% { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 0; }
      90% { transform: translateX(4px);  opacity: 1; }
      93% { transform: translateX(-3px); opacity: 1; }
      95% { transform: translateX(2px);  opacity: 1; }
    }

    @keyframes scanline {
      0%   { top: -5%; }
      100% { top: 105%; }
    }

    /* ─── RESPONSIVE ─── */
    @media (max-width: 640px) {
      .sinopsis-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 1.5rem; }
      .sinopsis-label { display: none; }
      .footer-links { gap: 1rem; }
      .plataformas-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
    }

    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
      *, *::before, *::after { animation: none !important; transition: none !important; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

  <canvas id="glitch-canvas"></canvas>
  <div class="scanline"></div>

  <!-- ══════ HERO -->
  <section id="hero">
    <p class="hero-eyebrow">SOY UNA PELÍCULA — 2026 — 75 MIN</p>

    <h1 class="hero-title">
      <span class="block glitch" data-text="LOS 400">LOS 400</span>
      <span class="block">ERRORES</span>
    </h1>

    <div class="hero-sub">
      <span class="hero-sub-line c-magenta">UNA PELÍCULA QUE FRACASA.</span>
      <span class="hero-sub-line c-cyan">ESTOY VIVA.</span>
      <span class="hero-sub-line c-naranja">MÍRAME.</span>
      <span class="hero-sub-line c-violeta">ESCÚCHAME.</span>
      <span class="hero-sub-line" style="color:var(--blanco);opacity:.4">SIÉNTEME.</span>
    </div>

    <span class="scroll-hint">↓ &nbsp; scroll</span>
  </section>

  <!-- ══════ HABLA -->
  <section id="habla">
    <div class="speak-block">
      <p class="speak-line white">YO SOY LA PELÍCULA.</p>
      <p class="speak-line yellow">FOTOGRAMAS.</p>
      <p class="speak-line cy">PÍXELES.</p>
      <p class="speak-line mag">ONDAS.</p>
      <p class="speak-line white">SOY UN ECO EN EL TIEMPO.</p>
      <p class="speak-line or">SOY DÍGITOS.</p>
      <p class="speak-line vi">SOY DANZA EN LA MATRIX.</p>
      <p class="speak-line white">SOY UNA SUBLEVACIÓN MUTANTE.</p>
      <p class="speak-line yellow">LUCHA DE IMÁGENES.</p>
      <p class="speak-line mag">VIRUTA DIGITAL.</p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ══════ TRAILER -->
  <section id="trailer">
    <p class="trailer-label">TRAILER — UNA PELÍCULA QUE FRACASA</p>
    <div class="video-wrap">
      <!--
        Reemplaza con tu iframe:
        <iframe src="https://player.vimeo.com/video/TU_ID?color=ffec00&title=0&byline=0" allowfullscreen></iframe>
      -->
      <div class="video-placeholder">
        <span class="video-placeholder-title">TRAILER</span>
        <span class="video-placeholder-sub">// INSERTAR IFRAME //</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ══════ PLATAFORMAS -->
  <section id="plataformas">
    <div class="plataformas-header">
      <h2 class="plataformas-title">VER LA PELÍCULA</h2>
      <span class="plataformas-precio">USD 5</span>
    </div>
    <p class="plataformas-sub">ELIGE TU PLATAFORMA · ACCESO COMPLETO · 75 MIN</p>

    <div class="plataformas-grid">

      <a href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="plataforma-btn" style="--color-acento:var(--cyan)">
        <div>
          <div class="plat-nombre">VIMEO</div>
          <div class="plat-tipo">Streaming / VOD</div>
        </div>
        <div class="plat-arrow">→</div>
      </a>

      <a href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="plataforma-btn" style="--color-acento:var(--amarillo)">
        <div>
          <div class="plat-nombre">GUMROAD</div>
          <div class="plat-tipo">Descarga digital</div>
        </div>
        <div class="plat-arrow">→</div>
      </a>

      <a href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="plataforma-btn" style="--color-acento:var(--magenta)">
        <div>
          <div class="plat-nombre">ONLYFANS</div>
          <div class="plat-tipo">Archivo · Lo digital</div>
        </div>
        <div class="plat-arrow">→</div>
      </a>

      <a href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="plataforma-btn" style="--color-acento:var(--naranja)">
        <div>
          <div class="plat-nombre">HOTMART</div>
          <div class="plat-tipo">Pago online</div>
        </div>
        <div class="plat-arrow">→</div>
      </a>

      <a href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="plataforma-btn" style="--color-acento:var(--violeta)">
        <div>
          <div class="plat-nombre">EVENTIVE</div>
          <div class="plat-tipo">Cine · Festivales</div>
        </div>
        <div class="plat-arrow">→</div>
      </a>

      <a href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="plataforma-btn" style="--color-acento:var(--cyan)">
        <div>
          <div class="plat-nombre">ITCH.IO</div>
          <div class="plat-tipo">Arte digital</div>
        </div>
        <div class="plat-arrow">→</div>
      </a>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ══════ INTENTA TICKER -->
  <section id="intenta">
    <div class="intenta-scroll" aria-hidden="true">
      <span class="intenta-word">INTENTA</span>
      <span class="intenta-word err">ERROR</span>
      <span class="intenta-word">INTENTA</span>
      <span class="intenta-word">INTENTA</span>
      <span class="intenta-word err">ERROR</span>
      <span class="intenta-word">INTENTA</span>
      <span class="intenta-word">INTENTA</span>
      <span class="intenta-word err">ERROR</span>
      <span class="intenta-word">INTENTA</span>
      <span class="intenta-word">INTENTA</span>
      <span class="intenta-word err">ERROR</span>
      <span class="intenta-word">INTENTA</span>
      <!-- loop -->
      <span class="intenta-word">INTENTA</span>
      <span class="intenta-word err">ERROR</span>
      <span class="intenta-word">INTENTA</span>
      <span class="intenta-word">INTENTA</span>
      <span class="intenta-word err">ERROR</span>
      <span class="intenta-word">INTENTA</span>
      <span class="intenta-word">INTENTA</span>
      <span class="intenta-word err">ERROR</span>
      <span class="intenta-word">INTENTA</span>
      <span class="intenta-word">INTENTA</span>
      <span class="intenta-word err">ERROR</span>
      <span class="intenta-word">INTENTA</span>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ══════ SINOPSIS -->
  <section id="sinopsis">
    <div class="sinopsis-grid">
      <div>
        <p class="sinopsis-label">// LA PELÍCULA<br>HABLA.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="sinopsis-text">
        <p>Escribí un guión original. Al tercer día de rodaje me di cuenta de que no iba a ser capaz de grabarlo bien. <strong>Todos éramos muy amateurs.</strong> No había dinero. Yo la protagonizaba y mi actuación era mala. Mi dirección, errática.</p>
        <p>Sin embargo, luego de <strong>13 años de trabajo</strong>, montando la película, grabando nuevas partes, mostrándola y fracasando, la ajusté y ajusté hasta que por fin la terminé.</p>
        <p>Hoy la película es una declaración sobre el cine. <strong>El cine es líquido. Cualquier video es una película.</strong> A través de 75 minutos, me ves envejecer, cambiar de estilos, mutar.</p>
        <p>Bienvenidos al infinito, donde se encuentran todas las imágenes, miles de películas conectadas como espejos que hacen una gran película: <strong>el cine.</strong></p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ══════ DATOS -->
  <section id="datos">
    <div class="datos-grid">
      <div class="dato-item">
        <div class="dato-num" style="color:var(--amarillo)">13</div>
        <div class="dato-label">años de trabajo</div>
      </div>
      <div class="dato-item">
        <div class="dato-num" style="color:var(--magenta)">75</div>
        <div class="dato-label">minutos</div>
      </div>
      <div class="dato-item">
        <div class="dato-num" style="color:var(--cyan)">400</div>
        <div class="dato-label">errores</div>
      </div>
      <div class="dato-item">
        <div class="dato-num" style="color:var(--naranja)">∞</div>
        <div class="dato-label">cortes anteriores</div>
      </div>
      <div class="dato-item">
        <div class="dato-num" style="color:var(--violeta)">1</div>
        <div class="dato-label">maletín vacío</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ══════ CTA FINAL -->
  <section id="cta">
    <p class="cta-pre">// TÚ ERES EL PROYECTOR</p>
    <h2 class="cta-phrase">
      ELIGE<br>DÓNDE <em>VERME.</em>
    </h2>
    <p class="cta-elige">↑ SELECCIONA UNA PLATAFORMA ARRIBA</p>
  </section>

  <!-- ══════ FOOTER -->
  <footer>
    <span class="footer-logo">LOS 400 ERRORES</span>
    <ul class="footer-links">
      <li><a href="https://instagram.com/los400errores" target="_blank" rel="noopener">INSTAGRAM</a></li>
      <li><a href="https://tiktok.com/@los400errores" target="_blank" rel="noopener">TIKTOK</a></li>
      <li><a href="https://youtube.com/@los400errores" target="_blank" rel="noopener">YOUTUBE</a></li>
      <li><a href="https://letterboxd.com/film/los-400-errores" target="_blank" rel="noopener">LETTERBOXD</a></li>
    </ul>
  </footer>

  <!-- ERROR TICKER -->
  <div class="error-ticker" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="error-ticker-inner">
      <span>ERROR 404 — PELÍCULA NO ENCONTRADA</span>
      <span>///</span>
      <span>FRAME CORRUPTO — REINICIANDO</span>
      <span>///</span>
      <span>SEÑAL PERDIDA — BUSCANDO SEÑAL</span>
      <span>///</span>
      <span>DATO MUTANDO — ESTOY VIVA</span>
      <span>///</span>
      <span>ERROR 404 — PELÍCULA NO ENCONTRADA</span>
      <span>///</span>
      <span>FRAME CORRUPTO — REINICIANDO</span>
      <span>///</span>
      <span>SEÑAL PERDIDA — BUSCANDO SEÑAL</span>
      <span>///</span>
      <span>DATO MUTANDO — ESTOY VIVA</span>
      <span>///</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <script>
    // GLITCH CANVAS
    const canvas = document.getElementById('glitch-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    let W, H;
    function resizeCanvas() { W = canvas.width = window.innerWidth; H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight; }
    resizeCanvas();
    window.addEventListener('resize', resizeCanvas);
    const COLORS = ['#FFEC00','#FF006E','#08C8FF','#FF4500','#9B00D4'];
    function drawGlitch() {
      ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);
      if (Math.random() > 0.87) {
        const n = Math.floor(Math.random()*3)+1;
        for (let i=0;i<n;i++) {
          ctx.fillStyle = COLORS[Math.floor(Math.random()*COLORS.length)];
          ctx.fillRect(0, Math.random()*H, W, Math.random()*2+1);
        }
      }
      requestAnimationFrame(drawGlitch);
    }
    drawGlitch();

    // SCROLL REVEAL
    const lines = document.querySelectorAll('.speak-line');
    const revealObs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
      entries.forEach((e, i) => {
        if (e.isIntersecting) setTimeout(() => e.target.classList.add('visible'), i * 75);
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.1 });
    lines.forEach(l => revealObs.observe(l));
  </script>
</body>
</html>
  collage_black: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  collage_tiktok: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  frame_soy: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  glitch_corridor: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  glitch_red: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  hero_cualquier: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  hero_ser: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  mosaic_col: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  mosaic_pixel: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  multi_sky: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  sky_four: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
};

// ── ASSIGN IMAGES
document.getElementById("heroBg").style.backgroundImage = `url(${I.hero_ser})`;
document.getElementById("hablaImg").innerHTML = `<img src="${I.frame_soy}" alt="SOY — La película habla" loading="lazy"/>`;
document.getElementById("cvBg").style.backgroundImage = `url(${I.hero_cualquier})`;

// ── MOSAIC STRIP
const mosaicImgs = [I.mosaic_pixel, I.glitch_red, I.collage_black, I.mosaic_col];
const strip = document.getElementById("mosaicStrip");
mosaicImgs.forEach((src,i) => {
  const img = document.createElement("img");
  img.src = src;
  img.alt = "";
  img.loading = "lazy";
  strip.appendChild(img);
});

// ── GALLERY GRID
const galData = [
  {src: I.collage_tiktok, label: "ARCHIVO · TIKTOK", cls: "tall"},
  {src: I.glitch_corridor, label: "GLITCH · CORREDOR"},
  {src: I.multi_sky, label: "CORTES · CIELO", cls: "span2"},
  {src: I.sky_four, label: "CUATRO TIEMPOS"},
  {src: I.glitch_red, label: "ERROR · ROJO"},
];
const galGrid = document.getElementById("galGrid");
galData.forEach(d => {
  const cell = document.createElement("div");
  cell.className = "gal-cell" + (d.cls ? " "+d.cls : "");
  cell.innerHTML = `<img src="${d.src}" alt="${d.label}" loading="lazy"/>
    <span class="gal-label" style="color:var(--verde)">${d.label}</span>`;
  galGrid.appendChild(cell);
});

// ── GLITCH CANVAS
const gc = document.getElementById("gc");
const ctx = gc.getContext("2d");
let W, H;
function rs(){ W=gc.width=innerWidth; H=gc.height=innerHeight; }
rs(); window.addEventListener("resize", rs);
const COLS = ["#FFEC00","#C93F63","#00FF41","#2B2DFF","#FF5200","#00C8FF","#FF0033"];
function glitch(){
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);
  if(Math.random()>.88){
    const n=Math.floor(Math.random()*3)+1;
    for(let i=0;i<n;i++){
      ctx.fillStyle=COLS[Math.floor(Math.random()*COLS.length)];
      ctx.fillRect(0,Math.random()*H,W,Math.random()*2+.5);
    }
  }
  requestAnimationFrame(glitch);
}
glitch();

// ── SCROLL REVEAL — habla lines
const lines = document.querySelectorAll(".habla-line");
const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries=>{
  entries.forEach((e,i)=>{
    if(e.isIntersecting) setTimeout(()=>e.target.classList.add("vis"), i*70);
  });
},{threshold:.1});
lines.forEach(l=>obs.observe(l));

// ── CRO: highlight Vimeo card on scroll into view
const vimeoCard = document.querySelector(".plat-card.featured");
const vObs = new IntersectionObserver(entries=>{
  entries.forEach(e=>{
    if(e.isIntersecting){
      e.target.style.transform="scale(1.01)";
      e.target.style.transition="transform .3s";
    } else {
      e.target.style.transform="";
    }
  });
},{threshold:.3});
if(vimeoCard) vObs.observe(vimeoCard);
</script>
</body>
</html>
